name: Oyster Perpetual 41
description:
The three-piece links Perpetual is the foundation of the Rolex lineup - no date, no bezel complications, no second time zone. Just a clean dial, baton hour markers, and the three-piece links case and bracelet that define the platform. The black dial version is the most readable: strong contrast, simple, deliberate.

In the Artemis Essential range, this three-piece links Perpetual uses a Miyota Japanese automatic movement. The domed bezel keeps the case profile low and clean, and the three-piece link bracelet closes with the Folding clasp. At $300, it is the most accessible entry point in the Artemis Essential catalogue.
descriptionShort: three-piece links Perpetual 41 with black dial - no complications, pure three-piece links design, most accessible Essential entry.
keyPoints: Clean black dial - no date, no complications
three-piece link bracelet with Folding clasp
Most accessible entry in the Essential range - from $300
seoTitle: Rolex Oyster Perpetual 41 Black Essential | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Oyster Perpetual 41 Black at Artemis - from $320 CAD. 30-day returns, tracked Canada shipping.
descriptionFr:
L'3 maillons Perpetual est la base de la gamme Rolex - sans date, sans complication de lunette, sans second fuseau horaire. Juste un cadran propre, des index bâtons et le boîtier et le bracelet 3 maillons qui définissent la plateforme. La version à cadran noir est la plus lisible : fort contraste, simple, délibéré.

Dans la gamme Essential Artemis, cette 3 maillons Perpetual utilise un mouvement automatique japonais Miyota. La lunette bombée maintient le profil du boîtier bas et propre, et le bracelet 3 maillons se ferme avec l'fermoir déployant. À 300 $, c'est le point d'entrée le plus accessible dans le catalogue Essential Artemis.
descriptionShortFr: 3 maillons Perpetual 41 à cadran noir - aucune complication, design 3 maillons pur, entrée Essential la plus accessible.
keyPointsFr: Cadran noir épuré - sans date, sans complication
Entrée la plus accessible de la gamme Essential - à partir de 300 $
